dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9248 IH: Recreation Permitting Improvement Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Hurd of Colorado (for himself and Mr. Deluzio) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Natural Resources

form.official-title: To amend the FAST Act to include certain recreation activities as covered projects subject to Federal permitting improvement, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Recreation Permitting Improvement Act.

section.header: Covered projects for Federal permitting improvement
section.text: Section 41001(6)(A) of the FAST Act (42 U.S.C. 4370m(6)(A)) is amended by inserting recreation, before or any other sector.
